data.title: JIOS Aerogel® secures Hyundai contract through new licensing model. Korean licensee wins major contract to supply Thermal Blade® for Hyundai and Kia's next-gen vehicles.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Singapore, JIOS Aerogel (JIOS), known for its expertise in silica aerogel technology, revealed that its licensed manufacturer in Korea has successfully obtained a significant contract. This contract entails the supply of Thermal Blade® thermal runaway barriers for the upcoming models of Hyundai and Kia.

data.title: Velan Holding to sell its entire stake in Velan Inc. to Birch Hill Equity for C$203,922,040. Agree to sell 15,566,567 multiple voting shares.
data.description: In Montreal on January 14, 2026, Velan Inc. (TSX: VLN) disclosed that Velan Holding Co. Ltd. has reached an agreement to sell 15,566,567 multiple voting shares and one subordinate voting share to Birch Hill Equity Partners Management Inc. This sale represents about 72.1% of the company's total shares and 92.8% of its combined voting rights, amounting to C$203,922,040.80 at a price of C$13.10 per share. Velan Holding, the current controlling shareholder, along with two related entities linked to Velan Holding shareholders, are the beneficiaries of this transaction. Birch Hill is a prominent Canadian investment firm known for its 30-year history of utilizing patient capital and operational proficiency to elevate market leaders for sustained global expansion.

data.title: H2O.ai reaccredited by IMDA Singapore for GenAI product suite, committing to secure enterprise-grade AI solutions.
data.description: H2O.ai, a prominent AI company, has recently renewed its accreditation under Singapore’s Infocomm Media Development Authority (IMDA)’s programme for their innovative Enterprise GenAI product suite. This renewal highlights H2O.ai’s dedication to providing secure and enterprise-level AI solutions for both public and private sectors in Singapore. The company is committed to delivering responsible AI solutions as organizations in Singapore seek advanced technologies for their operations.

data.title: Harley-Davidson introduces 13 new motorcycles in 2026, including Liberty Edition Models to mark 250th USA anniversary.
data.description: Harley-Davidson has announced the launch of 13 new models as part of its 2026 motorcycle collection on H-D.com. These models, known as the Liberty Edition, are being released in celebration of the 250th anniversary of the United States. The unveiling took place during the "Model Year 2026 Reveal - Chapter Two" event on January 14, 2026, in Milwaukee. This marks a significant addition to the company's lineup in honor of this milestone in American history.

data.title: Bristow Group prices $500M senior secured notes in private offering with 6.75% interest due 2033.
data.description: Today, Bristow Group Inc. (NYSE: VTOL) revealed the pricing details of an increased private offering. The offering now stands at $500 million in total, with a 6.75% interest rate on senior secured notes due in 2033. This offering was made specifically to eligible purchasers following...

data.title: Robbins LLP calls on investors who lost money in SLM Corporation to learn about their rights after a class action suit was filed for those who invested between July 25 and August 14, 2025.
data.description: In San Diego on January 14, 2026, Robbins LLP issued a reminder to stockholders regarding a class action lawsuit initiated for investors who bought SLM Corporation (NASDAQ: SLM, SLMBP) securities from July 25, 2025, to August 14, 2025. SLM, also known as Sallie Mae, is the focal point of the lawsuit which aims to address potential misconduct during the stated period of time.
